statements.select: SELECT $TopCount$ a.Seq, a.TeacherName, a.ExpertiseCode, (SELECT bb.ExpertiseName + ',' FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(a.ExpertiseCode,''), ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) AS Expertise_Str, a.Sex, a.SelfPicPath FROM Teacher a WHERE a.HomePageCarousel='Y' AND a.Online='Y'

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.TeacherName) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.ACCOUNT, a.IDNO, a.UnitCode, a.Sex, a.TeacherName, a.TeacherEName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.Birthday, 111) AS Birthday, a.IsShowBirthday, a.Tel, a.IsShowTel, a.Phone, a.IsShowPhone, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Address, a.IsShowAddress, a.Email, a.IsShowEmail, a.EmailWork, a.IsShowEmailWork, a.EduLevelHighest, a.EduSchool1, a.EduDept1, a.EduLevel1, a.EduSchool2, a.EduDept2, a.EduLevel2, a.EduSchool3, a.EduDept3, a.EduLevel3, a.ServiceUnit1, a.JobTitle1, a.ServiceUnit2, a.JobTitle2, a.ExpertiseDesc, a.ExpertiseCode, a.TeachJobAbilityDC, a.TeachJobAbilityBC, a.TeachJobAbilityKC, a.TeachArea, a.TeachIndustryDetCode, a.WorkHistory, a.ProLicense, a.SelfIntroduction, a.SelfPicPath, a.Online, a.JoinYear, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.OfflineDate, 111) AS OfflineDate, a.OfflineReason, a.OfflineReasonRemark, a.HomePageCarousel, a.CreatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, ISNULL(a.TeacherName,'') + ',' + ISNULL(a.TeacherEName,'') + ',' + ISNULL(CAST(a.ExpertiseDesc AS NVARCHAR),'') + (SELECT ',' + bb.ExpertiseName FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(a.ExpertiseCode,''), ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) AS forKeyword, (SELECT bb.ExpertiseName + ',' FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(a.ExpertiseCode,''), ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) AS Expertise_Str, b.EduName AS EduLevelHighest_Name, IIF(a.TeachJobAbilityKC='Y','知識職能(KC)、','') + IIF(a.TeachJobAbilityBC='Y','行為職能(BC)、','') + IIF(a.TeachJobAbilityDC='Y','動機職能(DC)、','') AS TeachJobAbilityStr, (SELECT COUNT(bb.value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachArea,',') aa LEFT JOIN STRING_SPLIT(#TeachArea_forSQL#,',') bb ON '%' + aa.value + '%' LIKE '%' + bb.value + '%') AS Find_TeachArea, (SELECT COUNT(aa.value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#LiveArea_forSQL#,',') aa WHERE a.Address LIKE '%' + aa.value + '%') AS Find_LiveArea, (SELECT COUNT(aa.IndustryMstCode) FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) AND aa.IndustryMstCode=#Industry#) AS Find_IndustryMstCode, (SELECT aa.IndustryName + ',' FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) FOR XML PATH('')) AS IndustryStr, a.IndustryAcademicType FROM Teacher a LEFT JOIN Edu b ON a.EduLevelHighest=b.EduLevel WHERE a.Online='Y'
AND ( ISNULL(a.TeacherName,'') + ',' + ISNULL(a.TeacherEName,'') + ',' + ISNULL(CAST(a.ExpertiseDesc AS NVARCHAR),'') + (SELECT ',' + bb.ExpertiseName FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(a.ExpertiseCode,''), ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) ) LIKE '%' + #Keyword# + '%'
AND a.TeachJobAbility$TeachUnit_forSQL$ = 'Y'
AND ( SELECT COUNT(bb.value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachArea,',') aa LEFT JOIN STRING_SPLIT(#TeachArea_forSQL#,',') bb ON '%' + aa.value + '%' LIKE '%' + bb.value + '%' )>0
AND ( SELECT COUNT(aa.value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#LiveArea_forSQL#,',') aa WHERE a.Address LIKE '%' + aa.value + '%' )>0
AND ( SELECT COUNT(aa.IndustryMstCode) FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) AND aa.IndustryMstCode=#Industry# )>0
/*a.UnitCode,a.TeacherName*/ ORDER BY NEWID()

SELECT a.Seq, a.ACCOUNT, a.IDNO, a.UnitCode, a.Sex, a.TeacherName, a.TeacherEName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.Birthday, 111) AS Birthday, a.IsShowBirthday, a.Tel, a.IsShowTel, a.Phone, a.IsShowPhone, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Address, a.IsShowAddress, a.Email, a.IsShowEmail, a.EmailWork, a.IsShowEmailWork, a.EduLevelHighest, a.EduSchool1, a.EduDept1, a.EduLevel1, a.EduSchool2, a.EduDept2, a.EduLevel2, a.EduSchool3, a.EduDept3, a.EduLevel3, a.ServiceUnit1, a.JobTitle1, a.ServiceUnit2, a.JobTitle2, a.ExpertiseDesc, a.ExpertiseCode, a.TeachJobAbilityDC, a.TeachJobAbilityBC, a.TeachJobAbilityKC, a.TeachArea, a.TeachIndustryDetCode, a.WorkHistory, a.ProLicense, a.SelfIntroduction, a.SelfPicPath, a.Online, a.JoinYear, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.OfflineDate, 111) AS OfflineDate, a.OfflineReason, a.OfflineReasonRemark, a.HomePageCarousel, a.CreatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, (select b.EduName from Edu b WHERE a.EduLevelHighest=b.EduLevel) AS EduLevelHighest_Name, (select c1.EduName from Edu c1 WHERE a.EduLevel1=c1.EduLevel) AS EduLevel1_Name, (select c2.EduName from Edu c2 WHERE a.EduLevel2=c2.EduLevel) AS EduLevel2_Name, (select c3.EduName from Edu c3 WHERE a.EduLevel3=c3.EduLevel) AS EduLevel3_Name, (SELECT bb.ExpertiseName + ',' FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.ExpertiseCode, ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) AS Expertise_Str, (SELECT aa.IndustryName + ',' FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) FOR XML PATH('')) AS IndustryStr, a.IndustryAcademicType, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_DC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_DC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_DC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_DC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_BC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_BC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_BC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_BC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_KC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_KC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_KC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_KC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_TOTAL,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_TOTAL, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_DC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_DC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_DC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_DC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_BC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_BC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_BC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_BC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_KC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_KC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_KC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_KC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_TOTAL,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_TOTAL FROM Teacher a LEFT JOIN ReviewReport r1 ON r1.Year=cast(Year(GETDATE())-1 as varchar(4)) and r1.IDNO=a.IDNO LEFT JOIN ReviewReport r2 ON r2.Year=cast(Year(GETDATE()) as varchar(4)) and r2.IDNO=a.IDNO WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.IsOnTop DESC, a.PostDateS DESC, a.PostDateE DESC ) AS ROWID, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120) AS PostDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120) AS PostDateE, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, a.Seq, a.PostType, a.PostCaption, a.PostTo, a.PostContent, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.IsOnTop, a.IsShowSignUp, a.MeetingSeq, IIF(GETDATE()>=b.SignUpDateS AND GETDATE()<=b.SignUpDateE,1,0) AS isCanSignUp, a.PublishedUnit, a.OrderBy, a.Actived, a.UpdatedAccount FROM MsgPost a LEFT JOIN Meeting b ON a.MeetingSeq=b.Seq WHERE ISNULL(a.Actived,'Y')!='N' AND a.PostType='1' AND a.PostTo='1' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120)<=GETDATE() AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120)>=GETDATE()
AND a.PostCaption + CAST(a.PostContent AS nvarchar(4000)) LIKE '%' + #KeyWord# + '%'
AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 112) >= #PostDate_A#
AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 112) <= #PostDate_B#
ORDER BY a.IsOnTop DESC, a.PostDateS DESC, a.PostDateE DESC, a.PostCaption

SELECT a.Seq, a.PostType, a.PostCaption, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120) AS PostDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120) AS PostDateE, a.PostTo, a.PostContent, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.IsOnTop, a.IsShowSignUp, a.MeetingSeq, IIF(GETDATE()>=b.SignUpDateS AND GETDATE()<=b.SignUpDateE,1,0) AS isCanSignUp, a.PublishedUnit, a.OrderBy, a.Actived, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MsgPost a LEFT JOIN Meeting b ON a.MeetingSeq=b.Seq WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MsgPostSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MsgPostAttached a WHERE a.MsgPostSeq=#Seq#
